positive: A sophisticated and minimalist line art illustration of a whimsical forest landscape. The style should be black line art on a pure white background, reminiscent of sophisticated Nordic folk motifs and modern botanical engravings. Main elements include stylized deer silhouettes grazing in a clearing, ancient, twisting oak trees, and various delicate, abstracted floral elements (ferns, wildflowers). The composition must be highly central and symmetrical, maximizing negative space for clean apparel printing. Use strong, continuous, varied line weights to give depth without shading. The overall mood should be serene, enchanted, and elegant. Studio quality, high contrast, graphic design vector quality.
negative: blur, grain, low resolution, text, watermark, logo, signature, excessive color, photo-realistic, messy, noisy, artifacts, out of frame, messy background, bad anatomy
